# Microsoft Foundry

> Microsoft Foundry (formerly Azure AI Foundry) is a unified Azure platform-as-a-service for enterprise AI operations, model builders, and application development. It provides a comprehensive set of AI capabilities for building agents, deploying models, and developing generative AI applications with built-in enterprise-readiness including tracing, monitoring, evaluations, and safety controls.

Important information:

- Microsoft Foundry unifies agents, models, and tools under a single management grouping
- The platform supports two portal versions: Foundry (classic) and Foundry (new)
- Foundry projects are the recommended project type for building agents and working with models
- The Foundry SDK is available for Python, C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Java

## Overview

- [What is Microsoft Foundry?](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/what-is-foundry)
- [What is Foundry IQ?](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/agents/concepts/what-is-foundry-iq)
- [What is memory?](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/agents/concepts/what-is-memory)

- [2025-04-01-preview - Authoring](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/authoring-reference-preview)
- [2025-04-01-preview - Inference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/reference-preview)

- [Azure OpenAI monitoring data reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/monitor-openai-reference)
- [Audio events reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/realtime-audio-reference)
- [Harm categories and severity levels](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-filter-severity-levels)
- [Prompt shields](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-filter-prompt-shields)
- [Sensitive data leakage](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-filter-personal-information)
- [Groundedness detection](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-filter-groundedness)
- [Protected material for text](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-filter-protected-material)
- [Default safety policies](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/default-safety-policies)
- [Safety system messages](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/safety-system-message-templates)
- [Content streaming](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/content-streaming)
- [Abuse monitoring](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/openai/concepts/abuse-monitoring)

- [Evaluate agent quality](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/observability/how-to/evaluate-agent)
- [Compare models](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/how-to/benchmark-model-in-catalog)

- [How to use image to text models](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/foundry/foundry-classic/how-to/use-image-models.md?context=/azure/foundry/context/context)
